author: ddalexb
description: Quickly fuzzysearch notes, cards and their content and shift focus to them within the currently opened canvas.

name: Simple CanvaSearch

releases.author: ddalexb
releases.description:
- Image extensions are now ignored from content indexing, no longer filling screen with garbage text

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ddalexb/obsidian-simple-canvasearch/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: ddalexb
releases.description:
- Support for using Ctrl+F while keeping search bar functionality outside of canvas (to use bind Ctrl+F to the canvasearch hotkey and unbind it for "Search Current File")
- Selecting a finding will now also highlight the card instead of just zooming to it
